nav dupe — chrome that must be dropped from the text

Overview

The Frontier guide covers the gatherer loop, yield modifiers, and resource quality tiers in enough prose that the extractor produces a real, chunkable paragraph of body text here.

  • Installation and setup of the survey tool
  • Node richness and yield modifier stacking

Follow the sections below to install the tooling and understand how the yield modifier stacks with node richness across the whole harvesting session for a rewarding run.
